channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: India may tighten rules on over-the-counter nicotine replacement products
item.description: The Drug Technical Advisory Board (DTAB) in India has proposed new regulations that could restrict public access to nicotine replacement products like gums and lozenges, sparking debate among health e...

item.title: Kwara community demands rescue of 176 abducted residents, rejects relief items sent by government
item.description: Residents of Woro community in Kaiama Local Government Area of Kwara State have openly rejected relief materials sent by a delegation reportedly representing the Nigerian government after a deadly ter...

item.title: Ghana Football Association Officially Appoints Carlos Queiroz as New Head Coach of the Black Stars
item.description: The Ghana Football Association (GFA) don appoint the experienced Portuguese coach, Carlos Queiroz, as the new head coach of the senior national team, known as the Black Stars. This news break on Monda...

item.title: Thyspunt identified as preferred site for Eskom’s proposed 5,200MW nuclear power station amid heritage concerns
item.description: A draft Environmental Scoping Report has recommended Thyspunt, located between Oyster Bay and Cape St Francis in the Eastern Cape, as the preferred site for Eskom’s planned 5,200MW nuclear power stati...

item.title: Immanuel Quickley listed day-to-day with hamstring strain ahead of Cavaliers playoff series opener
item.description: Toronto Raptors guard Immanuel Quickley has been listed as day-to-day after suffering a mild right hamstring strain, the NBA team confirmed on Monday. The injury occurred during Toronto’s decisive 136...

item.title: Trump removes AI-generated image depicting himself as Jesus following public criticism
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump faced widespread criticism after posting an AI-generated image that portrayed him as Jesus Christ on his social media platform, Truth Social. The image, which rapidl...

item.title: US imposes naval blockade on Strait of Hormuz after collapse of Iran peace negotiations
item.description: United States President Donald Trump has ordered the US Navy to blockade the Strait of Hormuz following the collapse of peace talks with Iran in Pakistan. In a lengthy declaration on his social media ...

item.title: Leeds defeat Manchester United 2–1 at Old Trafford to strengthen Premier League survival hopes
item.description: Leeds United produced a landmark victory at Old Trafford, beating Manchester United 2–1 in a Premier League match with major implications at both ends of the table. The result marked Leeds’ first leag...

item.title: Ezra Klein on why Democrats can’t replicate Joe Rogan’s influence
item.description: In his opinion piece for The New York Times, Ezra Klein argues that Democrats’ search for a 'liberal Joe Rogan' after the 2024 US elections missed the point entirely. Rogan’s influence, Klein explains...

item.title: Roblox introduces age-restricted accounts following safety concerns and grooming allegations
item.description: Roblox has announced a major overhaul of its platform with the introduction of age-restricted accounts for children and teenagers, following heightened scrutiny over child safety concerns, including a...

item.title: Globe and Mail hosts reader Q&A on Canada’s housing market and mortgage trends
item.description: The Globe and Mail is inviting readers to participate in an upcoming question-and-answer session focused on Canada’s current real estate market and mortgage conditions. Scheduled for Thursday, April 1...

item.title: Customs Officers Arrested in Quetta-Lahore Silver Swapping Scheme
item.description: Pakistan Customs has arrested two preventive officers following a shocking discovery of a deliberate fraud involving seized silver bullion. The officers were entrusted with transporting 688 kilogramme...

item.title: How U.S. Cannabis Legalization Boosts Business Innovation More Than Medical Research
item.description: This article examines how the legalization of cannabis in the United States has influenced innovation in both commercial and scientific domains. While legal access to cannabis has expanded dramaticall...

item.title: Alexa Ilacad reflects on growth and meaningful experiences in Your Face Sounds Familiar Season 4
item.description: Actress and singer Alexa Ilacad opened up about her experience joining the fourth season of the popular entertainment show Your Face Sounds Familiar, sharing that the journey has given her a deeper pe...

item.title: Eedris Abdulkareem visit Edo to commend Okpebholo’s progress on infrastructure and public services
item.description: Popular Nigerian musician and entertainer Eedris Abdulkareem don visit Edo State as part of Governor Okpebholo’s inspection tour of projects wey dey for Edo Central Senatorial District. Eedris talk sa...

item.title: Hill-Lewis to meet Ramaphosa as DA considers possible cabinet reshuffle
item.description: Newly elected Democratic Alliance (DA) leader Geordin Hill-Lewis is scheduled to meet President Cyril Ramaphosa on Tuesday in what party insiders describe as a “meet-and-greet” between the two politic...

item.title: Fire and Rescue Force Saves Eight Residents After Flooding in Siha District, Kilimanjaro
item.description: The Tanzania Fire and Rescue Force in Kilimanjaro Region successfully rescued eight people after their homes were affected by heavy flooding caused by ongoing seasonal rains. The incident took place i...

item.title: Tanzanian envoy urges East African unity to strengthen the creative arts sector
item.description: Artists from across East Africa have been encouraged to work together and speak with one voice to strengthen the creative arts industry and increase its global visibility. This message was shared duri...

item.title: Western Cape records 21 road deaths in 18 crashes despite intensified traffic enforcement
item.description: The Western Cape has recorded a concerning rise in road fatalities, with 21 people losing their lives in 18 separate crashes during a week-long enforcement operation from 7 to 12 April. Despite intens...

item.title: Southport Attack: Inquiry Highlights Potential Preventative Actions
item.description: An inquiry has concluded that the parents of Axel Rudakubanas, the teenager responsible for the Southport attack in 2023, may have been able to intervene and potentially prevent the tragic events that...
